## Nexora IPTV Global Pull Request Template

### 📝 Description
Provide a clear description of the modifications, features, or bug fixes implemented in this PR. Why are these changes necessary?

---

### 🚀 Type of Change
Select the appropriate checkbox:
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance optimization / refactoring (non-breaking)
- [ ] 📄 Documentation update
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

---

### 🧪 Testing & Quality Checklist
Verify that your changes meet our quality bar before submitting:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project defined in `docs/DEVELOPMENT.md`.
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and resolved all syntax/formatting warnings.
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` locally and it compiles successfully.
- [ ] I have run existing tests via `npm run test` and all passed.
- [ ] I have added new unit tests to cover my modifications (if applicable).
- [ ] I have verified that my changes look polished on both mobile and desktop screen widths.

---

### 🔗 Related Issues
Mention any issues this PR is linked to (e.g. Closes #123, Fixes #456).
